title: SWOLF Swimming Efficiency Calculator 2026 | Hacé Cuentas

intro: Swimming training is built on sports science principles (aerobic/anaerobic zones, progressive load, recovery). SWOLF (Seconds + stroKeS per Length) measures swimming efficiency: time (seconds) + strokes per 25m. Lower = better. Free calculator, updated for 2026.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **SWOLF = time(sec) + strokes per 25m**. Lower SWOLF = better efficiency. Direct calculation based on your input values.
useCases: Swimmers and coaches tracking performance metrics
Validate split times and stroke counts in training
Learning and coaching for stroke technique improvement
explanation:
**Swimming training** combines science (physiology, biomechanics) and practice. Aerobic and anaerobic zones, progressive load, rest, and nutrition form the complete training system.

## How SWOLF is calculated

SWOLF Index = time (seconds) + strokes per 25m. Lower = more efficient.

This calculator applies the formula to your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting if values seem unusual.

## Important Notes

This calculation is a reference guide only. For critical decisions (medical, performance-related, or competitive), consult a specialized coach or sports scientist. Values are current as of 2026 and updated periodically.

faq.a: Elite: < 40. Advanced: 40–55. Intermediate: 56–70. Beginner: > 70. Your level depends on age, experience, and training focus.

faq.q: How does SWOLF differ between 25m and 50m pools?
faq.a: Same formula applies. SWOLF in 50m pools is typically 10–20 points higher due to longer distances and turning efficiency.

faq.q: Should I focus on speed or distance per stroke?
faq.a: Improve distance per stroke first. Increasing efficiency before raw speed builds better technique and reduces injury risk.

faq.q: Do kick sets count toward SWOLF?
faq.a: Pure kick drills don't count (no arm strokes). Pull sets with kickboard do count—they measure arm-only efficiency.
Garmin and Apple Watch swimming modes calculate SWOLF automatically. Some Fitbit models also track it in pool mode.
Yes, all Hacé Cuentas calculators are free and require no login or signup.
Results are reference values using standard, internationally validated formulas. For competitive or training-critical use, verify with your coach.

faq.q: Does this tool save or share my data?
faq.a: No. All calculations run locally in your browser. We never send your data to any server.
